title: Pings
body:
This plugin adds @ pings like on Discord in Minecraft, which highlights the player name in the chat with a colorful @ and the player hears a sound.

I originally developed this for my server CityPvP.DE so that I, as the owner, can know when someone needs something in the chat even if I have minimized the game.

Therefore, the server is more or less the test server:

Java Edition:
IP: CityPvP.DE Port: 25565 (standard)
Bedrock Edition:
IP: PE.CityPvP.DE Port: 19490
